manifests.contents:
[workspace]
members = ["crates/bcr-wdc-eic-service", "crates/bcr-wdc-ens-service"]
resolver = "3"

[workspace.dependencies.anyhow]
version = "1"

[workspace.dependencies.async-trait]
version = "0.1"

[workspace.dependencies.axum]
version = "0.8"

[workspace.dependencies.config]
version = "0.15"

[workspace.dependencies.serde]
version = "1"
features = ["derive"]

[workspace.dependencies.serde_json]
version = "1"

[workspace.dependencies.surrealdb]
version = "2.2"

[workspace.dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"

[workspace.dependencies.tracing]
version = "0.1"

[workspace.dependencies.tracing-log]
version = "0.2"

[workspace.dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
version = "0.3"

[workspace.package]
edition = "2024"
version = "0.0.1"
license = "MIT"

[[bin]]
path = "src/main.rs"
name = "bcr-wdc-eic-service"
plugin = false
proc-macro = false
required-features = []

[package]
name = "bcr-wdc-eic-service"

[package.edition]
workspace = true

[package.version]
workspace = true

[package.license]
workspace = true

[dependencies.anyhow]
workspace = true

[dependencies.async-trait]
workspace = true

[dependencies.axum]
workspace = true
features = ["macros"]

[dependencies.config]
workspace = true

[dependencies.serde]
workspace = true

[dependencies.serde_json]
workspace = true

[dependencies.tokio]
workspace = true
features = ["signal", "rt-multi-thread"]

[dependencies.tracing]
workspace = true

[dependencies.tracing-log]
workspace = true

[dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
workspace = true

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
name = "bcr_wdc_eic_service"
plugin = false
proc-macro = false
required-features = []
crate-type = ["lib"]

[[bin]]
path = "src/main.rs"
name = "bcr-wdc-ens-service"
plugin = false
proc-macro = false
required-features = []

[package]
name = "bcr-wdc-ens-service"

[package.edition]
workspace = true

[package.version]
workspace = true

[package.license]
workspace = true

[dependencies.anyhow]
workspace = true

[dependencies.async-trait]
workspace = true

[dependencies.axum]
workspace = true
features = ["macros"]

[dependencies.config]
workspace = true

[dependencies.serde]
workspace = true

[dependencies.serde_json]
workspace = true

[dependencies.tokio]
workspace = true
features = ["signal", "rt-multi-thread"]

[dependencies.tracing]
workspace = true

[dependencies.tracing-log]
workspace = true

[dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
workspace = true

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
name = "bcr_wdc_ens_service"
plugin = false
proc-macro = false
required-features = []
crate-type = ["lib"]
